# Jobber
> Job application tracking platform

Jobber helps job seekers organize their job search with a Kanban-style board,
company management, resume tracking, application stages, and analytics.

## Features
- Track job applications across customizable stages
- Manage companies and contacts
- Store multiple resumes
- Analytics dashboard with insights
- Multi-language support (English, Ukrainian)

## Links
- Homepage: https://jobber-app
- Blog: https://jobber-app/blog
